eau_du_soleil.office_hours: FirstService corporate Mon-Fri 9-5; individual unit tours scheduled via listing agents
eau_du_soleil.current_promo: varies by individual landlord (condo, unit-by-unit rentals)
eau_du_soleil.honest_note: Condo building - no central leasing office. Best path: search Condos.ca rentals at 20 or 30 Shore Breeze Dr and call the listing realtor directly. FirstService 416-296-7368 only handles building services.

vita_on_the_lake.office_hours: Building concierge 24/7; Mattamy sales centre 416-630-8282 Mon-Fri 10-6
vita_on_the_lake.honest_note: Condo (70 Annie Craig). Like Eau du Soleil, individual unit rentals - find listing on Condos.ca and call the listing agent. Building number 647-496-4074 reaches concierge.

lago_waterfront.honest_note: Condo at 56 Annie Craig managed by FirstService. Best to browse listings on Condos.ca and book viewings with individual realtors. No single leasing office for the building.

markwood_4365.current_promo: Check website (purpose-built rental, frequent move-in incentives)
markwood_4365.honest_note: BEST FOR ER SCHEDULE - weekend hours 10-6 both Sat and Sun, weekday evenings till 7. Direct leasing line. Just call 647-956-9141 or email.

arc_erin_mills.current_promo: Skyrise Rental Residences from ~$2,950 (Daniels Corporation purpose-built rentals)
arc_erin_mills.honest_note: Daniels Gateway is a proper purpose-built rental program. Use the danielsgateway.com 'Book a tour' form or call Daniels rental hotline at 905-273-9333.

reid_drive.current_promo: Check listing portal (InterRent runs rotating concessions)
reid_drive.honest_note: InterRent corporate leasing - use the 'Book a Tour' button on irent.com. Site has a chat widget that gets faster responses than the 1-866 line.

lakewood_ii_1285.office_hours: Mon-Fri 9-5 (Homestead Land Holdings - typical weekday only)
lakewood_ii_1285.honest_note: Direct on-site number. Homestead is a large institutional landlord with limited evening/weekend availability - book early in the day.

lakeshore_2335.current_promo: 1 Month Free + $1000 Move-In Bonus (active per latest listing)
lakeshore_2335.honest_note: Park Property Management head office at 416-256-7368. Active move-in promo right now - good time to call. Weekday hours only.

lakeshore_2495.current_promo: Check MetCap listing - frequent first-month-free deals
lakeshore_2495.honest_note: GREAT HOURS for ER schedule - open 7 days, evenings until 8pm. BUT - MetCap is ACORN's 2025 Worst Landlord. Treat tour as a recon mission, not a commitment.

lakeshore_206e.next_open_house: Private tours only - book via website form
lakeshore_206e.honest_note: Signet Group manages. Use the website 'Schedule a tour' form - they respond same-day during weekdays. Office is small, no walk-ins.

waterford_tower_2645.honest_note: ADDRESS NOTE - this is 2645 Battleford Rd Mississauga (not 2645 Kipling). QuadReal-managed = institutional, well-run. Use RentCafe 'Schedule a Tour' button for fastest booking - bypasses phone tag.

143_stephen_drive.honest_note: GREAT 7-day evening hours for ER schedule. BUT MetCap is flagged AVOID by ACORN. Tour with skepticism - ask current tenants about pests and response times before signing.

65_windermere.current_promo: 1 MONTH FREE RENT (per Greenwin social media)
65_windermere.next_open_house: Use Greenwin 'Book a Tour' web form
65_windermere.honest_note: Greenwin has rotating 1-month-free deal. Direct on-site line. CAUTION - Greenwin reputation mixed on pest control. Tour and ask current residents.

60_mountview.current_promo: 1 month free at end of first year lease
60_mountview.honest_note: Small private landlord (Beaux Properties / High Park Property Management). Email is fastest - personal owner responds within a day. Also try 647-501-RENT (7368).

70_high_park_ave.office_hours: Brookfield concierge 24/7; individual realtors set their own hours
70_high_park_ave.current_promo: Condo - varies by individual unit owner
70_high_park_ave.honest_note: Condo building (no central leasing office). Browse Condos.ca / Zumper / Padmapper rentals at 70 High Park Ave and call the listing agent directly. Brookfield 647-351-6075 only for building services.

grenadier_square_40_high_park.office_hours: Mon-Fri 9-6, Sat 10-5 (GWLRA leasing centre at 65 High Park)
grenadier_square_40_high_park.current_promo: Studios from $1,885 / 1BR from $2,025 / 2BR from $2,892 (verify on website)
grenadier_square_40_high_park.next_open_house: Book tour via gwlraresidential.com 'Schedule a Tour' button
grenadier_square_40_high_park.honest_note: Toll-free leasing line, on-site dedicated office at 65 High Park (next door). Easiest path: use the website tour form. GWLRA is institutional and responsive.

the_campbell_299_campbell.current_promo: 2 MONTHS FREE on eligible suites; rent from $2,025
the_campbell_299_campbell.honest_note: BEST 6-DAY HOURS for ER schedule - evenings to 7pm Tue-Thu, Saturday until 6pm. Active 2-months-free promo. Call 833-660-4195 or use online form.

old_mill_station_2675_bloor.honest_note: ADDRESS UNCERTAIN - 2675 Bloor W does not match a known building; the Old Mill Station condos cluster is 1 Old Mill Dr and 2 Old Mill Dr. Use Del Condominium Rentals or browse Condos.ca for these addresses.

concord_canada_house.office_hours: Mon-Fri 10-6, Sat 11-5 (Concord on-site rental office at 357 Front St W)
concord_canada_house.current_promo: Concord 'Now Leasing' incentives - verify on welcometorent.com
concord_canada_house.honest_note: Concord has a DEDICATED on-site rental office (rare for a condo). 416-883-3888 reaches their leasing staff directly. Skip Del Rentals (416-296-7368) - go straight to Concord's own program.

liberty_house_15_solidarity.honest_note: EXCELLENT 7-DAY hours, weeknight to 7pm. Direct on-site leasing line. Professional purpose-built rental in Liberty Village.
